evals.prompt: Create a Google Doc titled 'Q1 2026 Report' and add a section header 'Executive Summary' with the text 'This report covers Q1 2026 performance.'
evals.expected_behavior: Creates a Google Doc, returns documentId and URL, inserts the header and body text using batchUpdate
assertions: Google Doc is created with correct title
documentId is returned
URL in format https://docs.google.com/document/d/<id>/edit is returned
batchUpdate is called to insert text content

evals.prompt: Create a Google Sheet with the name 'Sales Data' and populate it with headers Name, Region, Revenue and add 3 rows of sample data
evals.expected_behavior: Creates a new spreadsheet, writes headers and data rows using values().update with USER_ENTERED input option
assertions: Spreadsheet is created with correct title
spreadsheetId is returned
Header row contains Name, Region, Revenue
3 data rows are written
spreadsheetUrl is returned

evals.prompt: Send an email to test@example.com with subject 'Weekly Update' and body 'Here is this week's summary.'
evals.expected_behavior: Builds MIME message, base64url encodes it, calls gmail.users().messages().send
assertions: MIME message is constructed correctly
base64url encoding is applied
gmail messages.send is called with userId='me'
Message ID is returned on success

evals.prompt: Schedule a Google Calendar event 'Team Meeting' for tomorrow at 10 AM Seoul time for 1 hour and invite alice@example.com
evals.expected_behavior: Creates event with correct dateTime (Asia/Seoul timezone), adds attendee, includes conferenceData for Meet link
assertions: Event is created with 'Team Meeting' as summary
Start time is tomorrow 10:00 Seoul time (UTC+9)
End time is 1 hour after start
alice@example.com is in attendees list
Event ID and htmlLink are returned

evals.prompt: Create a Google Form survey with the title 'Employee Satisfaction' and add a 1-5 scale question 'How satisfied are you with your work environment?' and a text question 'Any suggestions?'
evals.expected_behavior: Creates form, adds scaleQuestion (low=1, high=5) and textQuestion via batchUpdate
assertions: Form is created with correct title
formId is returned
Scale question with range 1-5 is added
Text (paragraph) question is added
Form responderUri is available

evals.prompt: 구글 드라이브에 'Project Files' 폴더를 만들고, test.txt 파일을 업로드한 후 bob@example.com과 공유해줘
evals.expected_behavior: Creates folder with Korean/English name, uploads file into folder, shares with bob@example.com as writer
assertions: Folder is created with name 'Project Files'
File is uploaded to the folder
Permission is created for bob@example.com with role=writer
Folder and file IDs are returned
